hyperedges.label: Portal auth guard pattern
hyperedges.description: Multiple portal pages share the same auth pattern: useQuery(getCurrentAffiliate) → check isAuthenticated → conditional 'skip' for dependent queries → return null if unauthenticated

hyperedges.label: Portal tenant theming via CSS custom properties
hyperedges.description: Portal components share --portal-primary CSS variable for white-label tenant branding across cards, sections, buttons, and chart bars

hyperedges.label: Pending portal pages not yet implemented
hyperedges.description: Payouts, Settings, and ProfileForm are referenced in route structure but source files don't exist yet - need implementation following auth-guard and suspense patterns

hyperedges.name: Authentication and Onboarding Flow
hyperedges.description: Full auth flow: unauth pages (sign-in, sign-up, 2FA, invitation) → auth layout (role-based routing) → dashboard. Involves Better Auth client, Convex rate limiting, two-step registration, and mandatory 2FA redirect.

hyperedges.name: Affiliate CRUD and Lifecycle Management
hyperedges.description: Affiliate list page with filtered/sorted/paginated DataTable, detail page with stats/fraud signals/commissions/audit log, and mutations for approve/reject/suspend/reactivate. Uses nuqs for URL state persistence, DataTable component with column filter chips, and CSV export via action.

hyperedges.name: Dashboard Resilience Pattern: Error Boundary + Tenant Stats Fallback
hyperedges.description: The dashboard page wraps DashboardContent in DashboardErrorBoundary + Suspense. If the heavy getDashboardData query fails (infrastructure error), the error boundary catches it and renders DegradedDashboard which uses the lightweight tenantStats.getStats query for essential metrics, following the graceful degradation pattern from scalability guidelines.

hyperedges.relation: shared_layout: PageTopbar + px-8 py-6 container, all under (auth)/settings/
subscription_lifecycle_mutations: all called from billing settings page with multi-step confirmation dialogs

hyperedges.label: Reports Dashboard RBAC Pattern
hyperedges.description: All three report pages share the same RBAC pattern: query auth.getCurrentUser for tenantId+role, compute canExport and canViewSensitiveData from owner|manager check, conditionally render ExportButton and sensitive data columns

hyperedges.label: Chart Component Pairing Pattern
hyperedges.description: Fraud dashboard charts are paired with skeleton variants (e.g., FraudSeverityChart + FraudSeverityChartSkeleton) for Suspense loading states. Each renders a recharts BarChart or LineChart inside a Card with 'no data' fallback. The affiliate trend chart breaks this pattern by using custom SVG rendering instead of recharts.

hyperedges.label: Date Range + Export Pipeline
hyperedges.description: All report pages use the shared useDateRange hook for consistent date filtering, convert to query params via getQueryDateRange, pass to Convex queries and CSV export actions. Fraud page uses a different export approach (client-side CSV assembly via escapeCsvField+downloadCsvFromString) while reports and affiliates use Convex actions returning base64.

hyperedges.label: All report pages share: Suspense wrapper → auth/RBAC gate → date range hook → Convex queries → MetricCards → data table/chart → CSV export. All use canViewSensitiveData to conditionally mask financial data for viewer role.

Components mask commission/currency values with '—' when canViewSensitiveData is false (viewer role). Pattern: `canViewSensitiveData ? formatCurrency(val) : '—'`. All report pages derive this from user.role === 'owner' || 'manager'.
Both tables implement identical gold (#0), silver (#1), bronze (#2) rank badge coloring with rankColors map and conditional rendering for top 3 vs remaining rows.

hyperedges.description: Report pages share a common architecture: Suspense wrapper, RBAC-based sensitive data masking, date range filtering via useDateRange hook, CSV export via Convex actions, and data truncation warnings

Admin tenant detail page uses tabbed navigation where the Overview tab composites SubscriptionSummaryCard, RecentCommissionsTable (via Convex query), PlanUsageCard, and QuickActionsCard with ImpersonateModal

Payout report page orchestrates three parallel Convex queries (metrics summary, monthly trend chart, export data) feeding MetricCards, PayoutTrendChart (Recharts AreaChart), and PayoutBatchTable with a shared CSV export action

hyperedges.label: Admin Tenant Detail Page Component Tree
Strategy Pattern: Mock vs Real Client

nodes.label: PromoLibrary
nodes.description: Affiliate promo template library with copy templates and downloadable banner SVGs. Uses tenant primaryColor for branding.

nodes.label: LinkPerformanceCard
nodes.description: Displays 7-day click performance bar chart with daily click stats, conversion count, rate, and mock earnings calculation.

nodes.label: PortalEarningsPage
nodes.description: Affiliate earnings page with payout banner, hero stats, payout method info, filter chips, and unified commission feed. Uses nuqs for URL state.

nodes.label: PortalAssetsPage
nodes.description: Brand assets page listing logos, banners, product images, and copy text organized by category. Shows usage guidelines when available.

nodes.label: UsageGuidelines
nodes.description: Collapsible card showing brand asset usage guidelines with expand/collapse toggle and portal-primary accent border.

nodes.label: AssetCategorySection
nodes.description: Collapsible section grouping image and text assets by category. Renders AssetCard for images and CopyTextCard for text assets.

nodes.label: AssetCard
nodes.description: Individual brand asset card with thumbnail preview, metadata (format, dimensions), and download button. Uses portal-primary CSS var for theming.

nodes.label: AssetDownloadButton
nodes.description: Planned/future download button component for brand assets. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: CopyButton
nodes.description: Planned/future copy button component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: BrandAssetPreview
nodes.description: Planned/future brand asset preview component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PreviewModal
nodes.description: Planned/future preview modal for brand assets. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: AssetStatsBar
nodes.description: Planned/future stats bar for brand assets. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: BrandGuidelines
nodes.description: Planned/future brand guidelines component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: LightboxModal
nodes.description: Planned/future lightbox modal for asset preview. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: AssetGrid
nodes.description: Planned/future asset grid layout component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PortalPayoutsPage
nodes.description: Planned/future payouts page. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PayoutHistoryTable
nodes.description: Planned/future payout history table component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PayoutStatusBadge
nodes.description: Planned/future payout status badge component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PortalSettingsPage
nodes.description: Planned/future settings page. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: ProfileForm
nodes.description: Planned/future profile form component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: PayoutMethodForm
nodes.description: Planned/future payout method form component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: NotificationPreferences
nodes.description: Planned/future notification preferences component. File not found on disk.

nodes.label: getCurrentAffiliate
nodes.description: Query returning the currently authenticated affiliate with tenantId for portal data scoping.

nodes.label: getAffiliateEarningsSummary
nodes.description: Query returning earnings summary including confirmedBalance for the earnings page.

nodes.label: getTenantPayoutSchedule
nodes.description: Query returning tenant payout schedule including nextPayoutDate.

nodes.label: getAffiliateDailyClicks
nodes.description: Query returning daily click statistics for the last 7 days for an affiliate's referral link.

nodes.label: getAffiliateBrandAssets
nodes.description: Query returning categorized brand assets (logos, banners, productImages, copyText, usageGuidelines) for a tenant.

nodes.label: CSS custom property --portal-primary
nodes.description: Consistent use of var(--portal-primary) across portal components for tenant white-label theming. Used in UsageGuidelines, AssetCategorySection, AssetCard, PromoLibrary, LinkPerformanceCard.

nodes.label: Suspense boundary with skeleton fallback
nodes.description: Portal pages use Suspense wrapper with dedicated skeleton components: EarningsSkeleton, AssetsSkeleton. Content is in a separate inner component (XxxPageContent) while the default export wraps in Suspense.

nodes.label: Clipboard copy with sonner toast feedback
nodes.description: Multiple components (PromoLibrary, AssetCard) use navigator.clipboard.writeText or download via document.createElement('a') with sonner toast.success/error for user feedback.
nodes.norm_label: clipboard copy with sonner toast feedback

nodes.label: Collapsible section with chevron toggle
nodes.description: Both UsageGuidelines and AssetCategorySection implement identical expand/collapse UX with useState(isExpanded), ChevronUp/Down icons, and button toggle header.

nodes.label: Affiliate auth guard with useQuery skip pattern
nodes.description: Portal pages check affiliate auth via useQuery(api.affiliateAuth.getCurrentAffiliate), then conditionally skip dependent queries with 'skip' until affiliate is resolved. Returns null if not authenticated.
nodes.norm_label: affiliate auth guard with usequery skip pattern

nodes.label: nuqs
nodes.description: URL state management library used in EarningsPage for period and status filter query params with parseAsString and useQueryState.

nodes.label: BrandAssets response shape
nodes.description: Brand assets query returns: { logos, banners, productImages (image arrays), copyText (text array), usageGuidelines (string), hasAssets (bool) }

nodes.label: ReferralLink with shortUrl/fullUrl/vanityUrl
nodes.description: Affiliate link structure used in PromoLibrary with priority: vanityUrl > shortUrl > fullUrl

nodes.name: SuspenseBoundary
nodes.description: Every authenticated page wraps its content component in <Suspense> with a skeleton fallback, following Next.js 16 streaming SSR pattern

nodes.name: ErrorBoundaryWithDegradation
nodes.description: Dashboard uses DashboardErrorBoundary that catches Convex query failures and falls back to DegradedDashboard using lightweight tenantStats query

nodes.name: RoleBasedRouting
nodes.description: Auth layout redirects admin users to /tenants and affiliate users to /portal/login based on authenticated user type/role

nodes.name: SignInRateLimiting
nodes.description: Sign-in page uses Convex rateLimit queries/mutations to track failed attempts and lock accounts temporarily

nodes.name: TwoStepRegistration
nodes.description: Sign-up creates auth user via Better Auth client, then calls completeSignUp Convex mutation to create tenant and app records

nodes.name: RealtimeAvailabilityCheck
nodes.description: Sign-up page debounces email and domain checks using Convex queries (getUserTypeByEmail, isDomainAvailable)

nodes.label: Session Cookie Auth for API Routes
nodes.norm_label: session cookie auth for api routes

nodes.label: Multi-step Confirmation Dialog Pattern (warning -> confirmation -> action)
nodes.norm_label: multi-step confirmation dialog pattern (warning -> confirmation -> action)

nodes.label: Settings Index Redirects to Default Sub-page
nodes.norm_label: settings index redirects to default sub-page

nodes.label: Convex Tenants API (getTenant, getPayoutSchedule, getAttributionConfig, updatePayoutSchedule)
nodes.norm_label: convex tenants api (gettenant, getpayoutschedule, getattributionconfig, updatepayoutschedule)

nodes.label: Convex Broadcasts API (listBroadcasts, getBroadcast, getBroadcastStats, getBroadcastRecipients, exportBroadcastData, createBroadcast, getActiveAffiliateCount)
nodes.norm_label: convex broadcasts api (listbroadcasts, getbroadcast, getbroadcaststats, getbroadcastrecipients, exportbroadcastdata, createbroadcast, getactiveaffiliatecount)

nodes.label: Utility Functions (getErrorMessage, getSanitizedErrorMessage, reportClientError, downloadCsv, generateCsv, cn)
nodes.norm_label: utility functions (geterrormessage, getsanitizederrormessage, reportclienterror, downloadcsv, generatecsv, cn)

nodes.label: DataTable + FilterTabs + nuqs URL State Pattern
nodes.norm_label: datatable + filtertabs + nuqs url state pattern

nodes.label: Cached Server Component with Client Wrapper Pattern
nodes.norm_label: cached server component with client wrapper pattern

properties.rbac: owner|manager can export and view sensitive data
owner|manager can export; viewer is read-only

properties.dataShape: {date: number, clicks: number, conversions: number, commissions: number}[]

nodes.label: Shared UI: PageTopbar, MetricCard, ExportButton, FadeIn, DataTable
nodes.norm_label: shared ui: pagetopbar, metriccard, exportbutton, fadein, datatable

nodes.label: TableSelector - Table picker with join reachability
nodes.norm_label: tableselector - table picker with join reachability

nodes.label: ColumnSelector - Column picker with stats tooltip
nodes.norm_label: columnselector - column picker with stats tooltip

nodes.label: QB Types - SuggestedJoin and AdminTemplate types
nodes.norm_label: qb types - suggestedjoin and admintemplate types

nodes.label: AggregationBuilder - Aggregation and GROUP BY UI
nodes.norm_label: aggregationbuilder - aggregation and group by ui

nodes.label: NotificationBell - Bell icon with unread badge
nodes.norm_label: notificationbell - bell icon with unread badge

links.description: PromoLibrary receives affiliateLink prop with shortUrl/fullUrl/vanityUrl and resolves priority order
PromoLibrary uses navigator.clipboard.writeText with sonner toast for copy template feedback
Both are portal link performance/management components that display affiliate link data with tenant branding
Both provide download functionality for affiliate marketing assets (banners/logos) with toast feedback
CopyButton is likely an extracted reusable version of the clipboard+toast copy pattern used in PromoLibrary and AssetCard
LinkPerformanceCard queries getAffiliateDailyClicks for 7-day bar chart data
LinkPerformanceCard uses var(--portal-primary) for today's bar highlight color
EarningsPageContent calls getCurrentAffiliate to resolve the authenticated affiliate and tenantId
EarningsPageContent calls getAffiliateEarningsSummary with affiliateId for confirmedBalance
EarningsPageContent calls getTenantPayoutSchedule for nextPayoutDate display
EarningsPage uses nuqs useQueryState for period and status URL state persistence
EarningsPage uses Suspense wrapper pattern with EarningsSkeleton fallback
EarningsPageContent uses the affiliate auth guard pattern with skip for dependent queries
AssetsPageContent calls getCurrentAffiliate to resolve tenantId for asset queries
AssetsPageContent calls getAffiliateBrandAssets with tenantId for categorized assets
AssetsPage renders UsageGuidelines when brandAssets.usageGuidelines is truthy
AssetsPage renders AssetCategorySection for logos, banners, productImages, and copyText categories
AssetsPage consumes getAffiliateBrandAssets response with logos, banners, productImages, copyText, usageGuidelines shape
AssetsPage uses Suspense wrapper pattern with AssetsSkeleton fallback
AssetsPageContent uses affiliate auth guard with conditional skip for brandAssets query
UsageGuidelines implements the collapsible section pattern with isExpanded state and chevron toggle
UsageGuidelines uses var(--portal-primary) for left border and icon color
Both are collapsible sections in the assets page implementing identical expand/collapse UX
AssetCategorySection maps imageAssets to AssetCard components
AssetCategorySection implements the collapsible section pattern with isExpanded state and chevron toggle
AssetCategorySection uses var(--portal-primary) for heading color and badge styling
AssetCard uses var(--portal-primary) for download button background
AssetDownloadButton is likely an extracted version of the download logic currently embedded in AssetCard
PayoutsPage would need getCurrentAffiliate for auth guard and tenant scoping (not yet implemented)
SettingsPage would need getCurrentAffiliate for auth guard and profile data (not yet implemented)
AMBIGUOUS: PayoutMethodForm may share data structures related to affiliate payment preferences but structure is unknown

links.label: queries getUserTypeByEmail + getUserRole for role-based routing after login
Back to Sign In button on 2FA page
Links to /sign-in from sign-up page and on USER_ALREADY_EXISTS error
Rate-limits failed sign-in attempts with lockout countdown
Renders SidebarNetwork animation in left panel
Renders Logo component in left panel
Indirectly via authClient.signIn which triggers databaseHooks.user.create.after → syncUserCreation
completeSignUp mutation for tenant + app record creation
getAllTierConfigs query for plan selection UI
Creates auth user then calls completeSignUp mutation
Debounced email and domain availability lookup with status indicators
Renders SidebarNetwork animation in left panel
Renders Logo component in left panel
Admin redirect to /tenants; default route under (auth) is /dashboard
Redirects admin to /tenants, affiliate to /portal/login based on user type
getCurrentUser query for tenantId and RBAC
getStats query as degraded fallback in DegradedDashboard
DashboardErrorBoundary catches Convex query errors, falls back to tenantStats

listAffiliatesFiltered, getAffiliateCountByStatus, approveAffiliate, rejectAffiliate, suspendAffiliate, reactivateAffiliate, bulkApproveAffiliates, bulkRejectAffiliates, updateAffiliateNote, getAffiliateStats
listCampaigns query for campaign filter dropdown
getAffiliate, getAffiliateStats, getAffiliateAuditLog, suspendAffiliate, reactivateAffiliate, updateAffiliateNote
Breadcrumb link back to /campaigns; redirects to /campaigns on archive
getCampaign, getCampaignCardStats, getCampaignSignupUrl, updateCampaign, pauseCampaign, resumeCampaign, archiveCampaign
Dashboard heavy query degrades to lightweight tenantStats on error
